title: About
headerTitle: Hi, I'm Muhammad Awais — Senior Mobile App Developer & Multiplatform Architect.
headerDesc: Senior Mobile Engineer with 6+ years of experience building high-performance, scalable systems using Native Android (Kotlin/Java), Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP), Compose Multiplatform (CMP), and Flutter—driven by Clean Architecture and MVI/MVVM design patterns.
expertiseSubtitle: High-impact mobile architecture, cross-platform engineering, and reactive system design
experienceSubtitle: Engineering resilient apps across HealthTech, FinTech, IoT hardware, and real-time platforms
